fields.apiNotes: Scoring service exposes one POST /score endpoint (OpenAPI-documented); auth via managed identity; 2s timeout with graceful no-score fallback.
fields.migrationNotes: One-time backfill of 3 years of FNOL features; nightly reconciliation job compares stream vs. batch counts.
fields.legacyNotes: ClaimCenter event add-on needs a vendor patch (lead time 6 weeks) - critical path; no sandbox for the SIU case system, testing against staging only.

rows.method: Event add-on -> Event Hub; REST callback
